question: Model a `Library` class that manages a collection of `Book` objects (from Q1) using a simple array or vector (without using STL directly for management, just as storage). Implement methods to add a book and display all books.

test_cases.input:
Add: The Hobbit, J.R.R. Tolkien, 1937
Add: 1984, George Orwell, 1949
Add: Brave New World, Aldous Huxley, 1932
Display
Add: Foundation, Isaac Asimov, 1951
Add: Dune, Frank Herbert, 1965
Add: Neuromancer, William Gibson, 1984
Display
test_cases.expected:
--- Library Books ---
Title: The Hobbit, Author: J.R.R. Tolkien, Year: 1937
Title: 1984, Author: George Orwell, Year: 1949
Title: Brave New World, Author: Aldous Huxley, Year: 1932
---------------------
Library is full. Cannot add more books.
--- Library Books ---
Title: The Hobbit, Author: J.R.R. Tolkien, Year: 1937
Title: 1984, Author: George Orwell, Year: 1949
Title: Brave New World, Author: Aldous Huxley, Year: 1932
Title: Foundation, Author: Isaac Asimov, Year: 1951
Title: Dune, Author: Frank Herbert, Year: 1965
---------------------

errors: Missing semicolon after class definition for 'Book'.
